items.name_en: P niki series new shopping bag is going to be a hit. Great for commuting or as a mom bag. It's really easy to carry, very lightweight, and looks good with any outfit. Shopping bags look best when they are large. Dimensions: 33x27x11.5cm. Code: 577999

items.name_cn:
LE 87 Lambskin Metal Clasp Bag
Full of vintage vibes, made of lambskin with a fine texture. Features a double-sided zipper, F R A M E handbag design, paired with diamond quilting and metal Le CASSANDRE! The unique shape adds more stylish details!
Equipped with a chain top handle that can be folded down, and a detachable shoulder strap! Suitable for day and night!
Don't miss out 😎
Style: 754001
Folded size: 26x13x5cm
Normal size: 26x26.5x5cm

items.name_cn:
🎐SOLFERINO BOX 🎐
「Newest Autumn/Winter Color」
2020 IT BAG_ Must-have hot model, conquered the entire fashion world before it even launched! Inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag uses original factory fine pin-stripe Box calfskin, excellent texture and flexibility! Inner design features three-layer accordion pockets, easily accommodating daily essentials. New "L" letter top and bottom half-open clasp, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim, it's so interesting!
Model: 634306.Zx Size: 19x13x5cm
